name: Campo Magnético
author: Physics Lab Team
description: Adiciona ímãs e fios com corrente como objetos nativos na categoria Eletromagnetismo

objects.name: Ímã
objects.draw: (ctx, obj) => { ctx.save(); if (obj.angle) { const c = Lab.utils.getCenter(obj); ctx.translate(c.x, c.y); ctx.rotate(obj.angle * Math.PI / 180); ctx.translate(-c.x, -c.y); } ctx.fillStyle = obj.fill; ctx.fillRect(obj.x, obj.y, obj.w, obj.h); ctx.strokeStyle = obj.stroke; ctx.lineWidth = obj.lineWidth || 2; ctx.strokeRect(obj.x, obj.y, obj.w, obj.h); ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff'; ctx.font = `bold ${Math.max(12, obj.h / 2)}px monospace`; ctx.fillText('N', obj.x + 8, obj.y + obj.h/2 + 5); ctx.fillText('S', obj.x + obj.w - 18, obj.y + obj.h/2 + 5); if (Lab.state.showMagneticField) { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(108, 99, 255, 0.4)'; ctx.lineWidth = 1.5; ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]); const center = Lab.utils.getCenter(obj); const radius = Math.max(obj.w, obj.h) / 2; for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) { const angle = (i / 8) * Math.PI * 2; const startX = center.x + Math.cos(angle) * radius; const startY = center.y + Math.sin(angle) * radius; const endX = center.x + Math.cos(angle) * (radius + 40); const endY = center.y + Math.sin(angle) * (radius + 40); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(startX, startY); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(center.x + Math.cos(angle + 0.5) * (radius + 20), center.y + Math.sin(angle + 0.5) * (radius + 20), endX, endY); ctx.stroke(); } ctx.setLineDash([]); } ctx.restore(); }
objects.update: (obj, dt) => { if (!Lab.state.isSimulating) return; const center = Lab.utils.getCenter(obj); for (const other of Lab.state.objects) { if (other.id === obj.id) continue; if (!other.charge || other.charge === 0) continue; if (other.static) continue; const otherCenter = Lab.utils.getCenter(other); const dx = otherCenter.x - center.x; const dy = otherCenter.y - center.y; const r = Math.hypot(dx, dy); if (r > 8 && r < 200) { const B = obj.strength / Math.max(r * r, 25); const forceX = -other.charge * B * dy; const forceY = other.charge * B * dx; other.vx = (other.vx || 0) + forceX * dt / (other.mass || 1); other.vy = (other.vy || 0) + forceY * dt / (other.mass || 1); } } }

objects.name: Fio com Corrente
objects.draw: (ctx, obj) => { ctx.save(); if (obj.angle) { const c = Lab.utils.getCenter(obj); ctx.translate(c.x, c.y); ctx.rotate(obj.angle * Math.PI / 180); ctx.translate(-c.x, -c.y); } ctx.fillStyle = obj.fill; ctx.fillRect(obj.x, obj.y, obj.w, obj.h); ctx.strokeStyle = obj.stroke; ctx.lineWidth = obj.lineWidth || 1; ctx.strokeRect(obj.x, obj.y, obj.w, obj.h); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.strokeStyle = '#000000'; ctx.lineWidth = 1.5; ctx.setLineDash([4, 4]); for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) { const yPos = obj.y + obj.h / 2; const xStart = obj.x + i * obj.w / 4; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(xStart - 8, yPos); ctx.lineTo(xStart, yPos - 4); ctx.lineTo(xStart, yPos + 4); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fillStyle = '#000000'; ctx.fill(); } ctx.setLineDash([]); ctx.fillStyle = '#000000'; ctx.font = 'bold 10px monospace'; ctx.fillText(obj.current + 'A', obj.x + obj.w/2 - 8, obj.y - 5); if (Lab.state.showMagneticField) { const center = Lab.utils.getCenter(obj); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(108, 99, 255, 0.4)'; ctx.lineWidth = 1; ctx.setLineDash([4, 4]); for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) { const angle = (i / 12) * Math.PI * 2; const radius = 25; const x = center.x + Math.cos(angle) * radius; const y = center.y + Math.sin(angle) * radius; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(108, 99, 255, 0.2)'; ctx.fill(); } ctx.setLineDash([]); } ctx.restore(); }
objects.update: (obj, dt) => { if (!Lab.state.isSimulating) return; const center = Lab.utils.getCenter(obj); for (const other of Lab.state.objects) { if (other.id === obj.id) continue; if (!other.charge || other.charge === 0) continue; if (other.static) continue; const otherCenter = Lab.utils.getCenter(other); const dx = otherCenter.x - center.x; const dy = otherCenter.y - center.y; const r = Math.hypot(dx, dy); if (r > 5 && r < 150) { const B = (obj.current * 2e-7) / Math.max(r, 10); const forceX = -other.charge * B * dy; const forceY = other.charge * B * dx; other.vx = (other.vx || 0) + forceX * dt / (other.mass || 1); other.vy = (other.vy || 0) + forceY * dt / (other.mass || 1); } } }

tools.name: Linhas de Campo
tools.action: () => { Lab.state.showMagneticField = !Lab.state.showMagneticField; Lab.render.all(); alert(Lab.state.showMagneticField ? 'Linhas de campo visíveis' : 'Linhas de campo ocultas'); }

tools.name: Partícula +
tools.action: () => { Lab.objects.add({ type: 'circle', x: Math.random() * (Lab.state.W - 100) + 50, y: Math.random() * (Lab.state.H - 100) + 50, w: 12, charge: 1, mass: 0.5, vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 80, vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 80, fill: '#3b82f6', stroke: '#1d4ed8', lineWidth: 2 }); alert('Partícula positiva adicionada!'); }

tools.name: Partícula -
tools.action: () => { Lab.objects.add({ type: 'circle', x: Math.random() * (Lab.state.W - 100) + 50, y: Math.random() * (Lab.state.H - 100) + 50, w: 12, charge: -1, mass: 0.5, vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 80, vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 80, fill: '#ef4444', stroke: '#dc2626', lineWidth: 2 }); alert('Partícula negativa adicionada!'); }
